name: Brown Rice & Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cold cooked brown or white rice
4 oz process sharp American cheese, cut into cubes (about 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse frozen green peas with cold water to separate; drain.
2. Mix peas, rice, chicken, celery, cheese, olives, and onion in a large bowl.
3. Whisk together mayonnaise (or salad dressing), lemon juice (or vinegar), salt, and pepper in another small bowl.
4. Pour the dressing mixture over the chicken mixture and toss gently to combine.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
6. Garnish with additional sliced pimiento-stuffed olives or tomato wedges if desired.
7. Serve in individual bowls or divide into 8 servings.
